---
title: "Curriculum Vitae"
title-block: false
page-layout: full
body-classes: cv-page
---

::: {.cv-shell}
# Curriculum vitae

::: {.cv-meta}
<span class="cv-label">CV last updated</span>
<strong>April 4, 2026</strong>
:::

My current CV is embedded below and available as a direct download. The page uses the PDF currently stored in this repository, so replacing the file updates both the download and the preview.

<p class="cv-download-row">
  <a class="hero-button hero-button-primary" href="site-assets/docs/cv.pdf" download>Download current CV</a>
  <a class="hero-button" href="site-assets/docs/cv.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Open in a new tab</a>
</p>

::: {.cv-paper-frame}
<iframe src="site-assets/docs/cv.pdf" title="Curriculum Vitae"></iframe>
:::
:::
